title: Updated after using for 3 months
text:
These head phones are comfortable and stay in my ear very well. They come with multiple size buds They also have nice sound quality as well as the microphone. The cord is much longer than other brands of ear phones which I appreciate. This was my first magnetic set of buds, at first this was annoying as they would stick to my car, gym locker, metal part of door frame etc. After awhile I got used to this and it does help immensely for the ear buds not getting tangled.
I received these ear buds in early February and used them daily at the gym and a few times a week for phone calls. The ear buds stopped working Mid may, over all they lasted 3 months. The ear buds still appear in great condition and have no loose wires but no sound comes out of them. I do see that they are suppose to come with a 5 year warranty so I will attempt that process and update/ add stars back if the process is simple and the issue is resolved.
Update- Amazing customer service. I emailed the support team

title: I hope you like BASS!
text:
First, the good. These earbuds appear to be made with good materials, and provide multiple sizes and materials in the ear-canal inserts. The wire gauge is good for the purpose and the volume is higher than most. They might last for a long time for normal use. The in-line controls seem to work just fine and the designers placed them in a good place along the wire. Good design principles seem evident.

But I might not use them because of the negatives.

These earbuds put so much bass on the music, voices, and even my white-noise generators that I cannot listen for long and revert to other options like my bulky over-the-ear headphones that I certainly cannot carry out of the house on my normal routine. I used the eq on my phone and dropped the bass out and raised the treble up as high as possible, and still there's too much bass.

I changed the ear canal inserts to their secondary option, a kind of rubber insert that doesn't fit the ear and doesn't eliminate

title: Love these, highly recommend.
text: Love these!  So comfortable and very well made. They stay put in your ears unlike the plastic ones. They also have magnets so the head pieces stay together. The sound is great also. If you are looking for wired ear buds then I highly recommend these.

title: Very nice for the price
text: These ear buds are great for the price! The color is very nice, it works great for what I need them for!

title: Great Ear buds...Great sound and comfortable
text: I received these about a month or two ago and use them primarily for going to sleep.  They have great sound quality, have an extra long cord, and are really well made!  I am extremely happy with these.  I recommend buying them!!!! On/off control on cord, as well as a volume button.

title: Nice long cable. pretty good headphones for the price.
text: Very comfortable to wear with multiple ear bud covers to choose from. I like the longer length of the cable so you can place your phone (or other device) into a pocket or backpack and not have the earphones be jerked out of your ears if you move wrong.  They have magnets on the back of the headphones so they can be connected and stored in the pouch.,  Seems to help prevent tangling. I am giving 4 stars as we felt that the bass quality was lower than we liked. Other than that we really liked these headphones and they seem to be a great value for the price.

title: Hollow sound with zero base, don't stay in ears
text: Am I missing something here? I see reviews stating that these are great headphones, but they have a hollow, almost lofi sound, zero base or substance, and they fall right out of your ears. I couldn't wear them walking down the street, let alone running on a treadmill. I wouldn't recommend them.

title: A few small extras
text:
Earbuds arrived on time undamaged and well packaged. They came in a small silver tin can and a small net bag was also provided so either or both can be used to store them in to protect them. Although cord is long it can be used with tv or stereo with extension cord if needed. It has separate jack for phone and other items. It also came with extra earbuds and a very small clip to use to help cord stay attached to clothes or whatever. I can’t comment on sound quality because I have yet to use them. I had bought them to use for night time listening to tv so I would not bother other family member. However, I am not able to use for that purpose as neither the tv nor the sound system has an jack provided for earbuds/headphones. I refuse to use radiation, cancer causing wireless/Bluetooth earbuds/headphones!! I hope this maker and others continue to produce earbuds/headphones with wires for those of us concerned about our health.
Update on 5-23-2019: The main problem I have fou

title: Yes, but, ...
text: It's a great product, however, none of my earplugs can be charged with those tips. They're just too bulky for the charging case. Have to take them off and on for charging. It's tedious. They fit well and snuggly in my ear though.

title: There great, till you forget your wearing them!
text: This is my second set, I like the packaging, the extra foam ear pieces, the carrying bag, the storage tin. I just wish I would remember I have them on instead of getting up and dragging my laptop by my ears. My earbuds always lose. Did i say how great the price is when you have to buy new ones. Thanks

title: Very good quality, not the most comfortable for small ears though
text: The sound quality is great, the cord is long which I really needed, and I love the way the buds will snap together magnetically, so I can wear them around my neck to use as a mic if I want to use my speakers. I do it that way over discord voice chats a lot. The only con for me, and the reason I gave it a 4 star, is that all the buds these come with are very uncomfortable in my ears. Luckily I was able to attach the buds from a different pair of foam ear-buds that were super comfy. My left ear is much smaller than my right so I can only use foam buds. That probably won't be an issue for most others, so I didn't let that affect my rating too much.

title: PS4 and Windows laptop compatible
text: The mic audio is good according to the other party members on PS4 and my teacher can hear me as well during virtual class meetings on my Windows computer. The sound quality is good as well and the bass is nice too. The only thing that really bothered me with these was the "memory foam" it was squishy, weird, and little particles stick to those buds. Thankfully they also include the silicone tips which never fit my ears but the smallest size proves to be comfortable enough for me to wear for long periods of time. Overall a good buy compared to cheaper earbuds.

title: Unimpressed
text: I've been using a pair of bose earbuds for 5 years and the insolation wore out. I'm not a bose yuppy but I tried these because of the great reviews. The memory foam seems like a gimmick. They do not want to stay in, I tried both sizes and was not impressed even just walking around the house. Great quality, function, but fails in performance for me. Returning.

title: Works well on PS4
text: Great quality, love that they are magnetic and the earbuds will stick to each other. They don't tangle and get annoying because of that. I use them for my PS4 and everyone says they can easily hear me and understand me and that they're good quality.

title: Five Stars
text: Better than I expected and with good quality comparing the price.

title: Don't last long
text:
Exceptional quality for the money. Excellent customer service. This is my second set. I broke the first set by yanking on the wire when it was wrapped around a button. Totally my fault!
Excellent sound quality. Both highs and bass. I usually listen to music for hours, with no problems.
The only thing that gave me problems with the first pair, was the volume slider. It can catch on something and raise or lower the volume unexpectedly. This pair has more tension on it, so that should be less of a problem. I would definitely recommend them.

title: Not worth it
text: The sound is nice and the magnets in the buds are a nice feature to keep them from getting tangled, but external sounds come through very loud over phone calls making it very hard for the people on the other end to hear me, and these earbuds didn't even last a year. Very disappointing. If you want to take advantage of the warranty, you have to pay to ship them back. It ended up being cheaper to just buy a new pair.

title: Luxury feel, sound quality can be improved
text:
I bought these for my mom and me. She likes the old fashioned in line earbuds.
First glance and feel, they have a nice feel and the material is durable. I like the magnet that holds the earbuds together. Its a decent case to hold everything together.
Sounds quality is not as impressing. The noise cancelation is not truly noise canceling. Phone calls are not very clear and microphone doesn't make me sound clear. Music is not the best if you like heavy bass songs.
For the price I expected a little more.

title: Audio is Terrible!
text: Id rather buy a $8 pair of earbuds from Walgreens than buy these again. I bought these for gaming and the audio is terrible! Its all muffled and and far from being clear/crisp. I have a $30 pair or earbuds from sony that I will continue to use and throw these in a drawer as a backup. Spend the extra $10 and get some nice earbuds that work!!

title: ear pieces/plugs
text:
Having difficulty getting the ear pieces to stay in. I have tried the different ear pieces, but still not working out.
Sound is great, but does not matter if they don't fit well.

title: Well made, soft on your ears, affordable, 5 year warranty, sound great! Great value !
text:
For the money, these are excellent phones. I was looking for a great sounding pair that wouldn’t hurt my ears watching TV with my head on a pillow. Also that wouldn’t drain my Roku remote while I listened wireless. My Bose over the ear sound great, but don’t work laying down...and drain 2 AA batteries quickly.
So I started reading reviews. I didn’t want to spend more than twenty dollars, wanted a long warranty(5 Years!), wanted soft phones for my ear canals, wanted excellent sound. These filled all those needs and are soft, sound great and don’t drain the batteries on my remote. Odd feature, they come in a small metal tin like chewing Tabbaco ....and I could not pry it open! I had to cut through the bottom of the tin to get everything out. Includes carry sack AND a splitter so two people can listen to one source. Recommended!

title: Great buy
text: Absolutely love using these for gaming. Great sound quality. Can hear people coming up from behind you with them.

title: great sound, great price
text: these earbuds are fantastic, i will definitely be buying a second pair. i am using them for gaming on my pc and the sound is just as if not better than my 200 dollar OTE headphones. i switched as i was getting a strange sore neck from wearing my heavy over the ear set, these light weight earbuds did the trick, the neck pain is gone and the sound is terrific, glad i switched! if anything for 20 bucks give it a shot they are worth it! the little magnetic ends are also nice to affix to my metal monitor stand for quick access and removal.

title: Pretty good overall, no noise cancellation
text: These were a replacement for others bought here on Amazon. The KLIM buds seem to be well made. Noise reduction and staying in ears not as good as others I've owned. Overall they're decent, I like the long warranty that's why I gave 4 stars.

title: Great quality.
text: Good noise cancelling and feel.  Tiny bit on the small side, and hard to tell which buds are bigger or smaller.  Also of note is they don’t last as long as silicone buds and tend to collect dirt and grime over time.

title: It Doesn't Get Any Better
text: OMG! OMG! I'm not paid or compensated. I am a videographer, gamer, and love music & big into sound quality. I have NEVER heard anything so clear & it's just amazing! The highs are crisp, the mids give awesome vocals & the bass is rich, it doesn't distort. Pick a comfortable ear cushion, plug in & rock out! Oh you're a gamer? Prepare to hear things you didn't even know were there! If you listen to music with your phone consider this, these ear buds play like there's an amp in them, meaning you don't have to turn them up as loud & you save battery juice! If you have an equalizer & use these, you can truly milk even more awesomeness from these! I just can't say enough about them, they're an amazing piece of kit. If you're still reading, BUY THESE! NOW! THANK ME LATER!

title: Perfect
text: It's great when literally all you have to do to get a product to work is plug it in. That's the case with these earbuds. Crazy easy. Effective. Good sound quality too. Glad I bought them!

title: Head phones fine, foam ear tips tore in a month.
text: Sound quality is fine with good bass, cord has held up well but the foam ear tips have torn after only a month of use and of course I threw out the box so no longer have replacements. Have never had a set of ear buds where the tips failed so fast.

title: Doesn't stay in ears
text: Don't stay well in ear and the way designed no option to switch to a silicone cover that would allow to lock more in ear.

title: Hurts my ears
text:
The ear bugs are either too large or too hard or in the wrong shape. They hurts my ears.
Sound volume is much lower then the headphone come with iPhone. I purchase this headphones for meetings working from home, but the ear bugs defeat the purpose.

title: Awesome
text: Love these ear buds!!! The packaging was everything. It even comes with a replacement earbuds and a nice little pouch to carry your earbuds. This company thought of everything. I will definitely purchase these again! Thanks

title: Very Muffled Sound
text: Like many others, I fell for all the positive reviews. The sound is very muffled, it sounds like you're listening to music with treble set to zero. Avoid these at all costs!

title: These things are tough.
text: I’m thoroughly impressed. Not just because they sound great, but they have surprising durability. I unintentionally torture tested my pair. I work heavy equipment so i like some noise cancelling, so i enjoy these over my Apple pair. I jumped in my work truck one morning, drove down the road to my morning work and climbed in the equipment to find my headphones were missing. I stripped my truck down while my equipment warmed up and couldn’t find my Fusions. I eventually gave up and went on about my day, but not before ordering a second pair to replace the pair i just wrote off. Fast forward a few days and two heavy thunderstorms. I drop off some equipment where i had been days earlier and look on the ground as i hop in the truck. My KLIM Fusions were right there, in a crusted over tire  track, caked in mud and sad. I picked them up not hopeful that they had any life in them, but I wanted to give them a second chance at life. I got home and cleaned them down with rubbing alcohol, said a w

title: Found them!
text: Took me a long time to find these ear buds. They were worth the search. Sound quality, is excellent. I wear them for workouts. And for music therapy.

title: Great customer service
text: My daughter's earbuds started not working about 6 months after purchase, probably more due to how rough she is with them. I emailed the company and they replaced them immediately! The sound qualify and the magnetic aspect is also great.

well built! not the best sound quality in my opinion. using for gaming on my laptop and my regular apple earbuds(that normally come with the phone) sound better than these. these don’t hurt my ears after a long period of time which is a plus

title: One Star
text: Case for headphones came but it was empty! No headphones.

title: These are good earbuds, they sound good and with the given ...
text: These are good earbuds, they sound good and with the given adapter can easily connect your computer. But they are not gaming earbuds. You can control the volume but the button on the controls is for making and receiving phone calls. This is a downer because I thought it was a mute button. When you are gaming you cant mute the buds from the controls.

title: Bad Sound
text: These came with one side not working well. Hardly any sound and a static noise. I do not recommend these at all. They are no better than a $5 pair you can buy at a department store. I paid $20 for these and am so very disappointed.

title: Great sound, sturdy quality
text: Love these so far. Great sound and good quality material.

title: clear audio
text: Ear phones work ok but what are the little girl heads for and how do oyou use them?

title: Multiple earbud foam means there is a set that will work for you.
text: Most ear buds come with foam that is just too big for my ears and therefore either uncomfortable for me or constantly falling out as I can't get them to get a good "lock" in the ear. If I want small earphones I need the ones that hang on your ear so they are not really that small, and they don't cancel much noise. I was real happy that, for a change, these earbuds come with a set of foams that are very small. They fit my ears perfectly and so they also did a tremendous job for me of cancelling outside noise. The sound itself was especially good for the price range. perhaps because it did a good job for me of noise cancellation. The wire includes a microphone, and is sufficiently long to reach my phone on the belt or in my pocket. I find most wires elsewhere are too short, limiting movement or pulling out of my ears, but not these. The sound on the microphone was very good according to friends I called to ask what it sounded like. The earphones are magnetic and can stick together for be

title: These are my favorite ear buds.
text: It normally does not take me long to kill earbuds. These are good enough quality, they last a good long time. The sideways plug is so much more stable and the cord is good and long. I'll be back again!

title: Music to my ears!
text:
These ear buds str just what I was looking for. They deliver clear, crisp sound whether I am on the phone or listening to music or podcasts. .
So glad that I bought them.

title: Might be good for gaming but not really for music
text: They're very nicely packaged - in a bag inside of a tin - but music sounds better in my cheapie Panasonic earbuds. Kudos, though, for the packaging, which is outstanding.

title: Does not fit ears good
text: The sound is fine but they don't fit if you have small ears!!  I tried all the options.  Nothing fits right.  The earbud covers are cheap and have fallen apart, I'm glad there are extra but 3 sets have arleady broken apart.  Horrible quality!

title: Sturdy
text: 10 year old grandson is rough on earbuds. After 2 years still holding up well.

title: super comfy, awesome case, not compatible with iphone
text: Great earbuds, long cord, awesome carrying case! They are comfortable and durable. The only reason I didn't give them 5 stars is because they aren't compatible with Iphone (the flat end is needed). They don't include the conversion plug.

title: You get your money's worth.
text: I used them for a couple weeks before I purchased a new Bluetooth pair of earbuds. They worked and sounded fine though I'm not a big fan of hoarded earbuds. I keep them for emergency use. But they were comfortable when worn for extended periods and the sound quality was great for 20 bucks. I'd buy them again.

title: Quality
text: I really like these ear phones. This is my second pair. I really like this product and will buy again. Also great price.

title: Great Value
text: I really like these earbuds. They work really well.

title: Didn't do it for me
text:
I purchased the Klim earbuds as a substitute for wearing gaming headphones, and I was overall disappointed with the product. After about a week of use, I noticed that the left earbud was significantly quieter than the right, making for an unbalanced and awkward experience. Due to this, I will be returning mine.

Assuming not all Klim earbuds have this problem and mine was just defective, I had some other problems with these headphones as well. The product comes with several styles of replacement buds, ranging from different material to different shapes, and even one in a different (red) color. Unfortunately, they all seem to be molded to fit about the same size ear. I have pretty average sized ears, maybe a little small. When plugging my earbuds into my PC (below my desk), I noticed the earbuds were sagging significantly in my ears. The metal material they used on the outside of the earbuds is a little bit heavy, and since the earbuds don't fit me well to begin with, t

title: Long cord.
text: I really like the memory foam plugs. Nice and neat container and pouch. The only thing is that the cord is really long so you have to figure out how to keep it from snagging. Accessories are nice too.

title: 2 pairs failed in 6 months- dishonest, STAY AWAY
text:
I am a pro sound engineer with 20+ years of industry experience.

Update: warranty was honored but in less than 2 months the cord has the same problem, the button on the remote doesn’t work, shielding issues. Stay away. These are junk! Customer service was friendly but lied about refunding my money!

Update- started breaking after 2 months-the ear buds themseves and the cord is breaking. Awful. Hope they honor the warranty.

Huge promises, doesn’t really deliver. This company should spend less on packaging and stickers and more on the product. The build quality itself seems great at first but these fell apart quickly just like cheaper ear buds. But the sound is just ok. Very clear in the mid and high range but bass and low mids are almost non existent. The in ear pads are of nice variety— but there’s not much variation and none fit my ear canal well to isolate sound. They also all fall apart quickly, expect to replace them. These are not noise canceling.

title: Great sound! An great sound cancellation!
text: These earbuds are amazing, I just purchased another pair. One for gym an one for everything outside of gym. The product is really of a quality. I like that the company almost seems to have hand made them and hand packed them. The earbud cover are great a memory foam type deal squeeze and roll then put in ear and expands to size to block out all other noises spiders or wind. Great sound

title: I can't believe how amazing these headphones are for the price!!!
text: I didn't expect much for the price, but I'm delightfully surprised with these headphones!! The sound is clear, loud and overall perfect!!! Best bang for your buck!!! Highly recommend!!!

title: Defective
text: The right earphone didn’t work - I requested a replacement and will update this review once I receive it.

title: They sound great.
text: I have only used these once so far. I plugged it in to a PlayStation controller. It sounded great. I’m happy.

title: nice
text: A great deal on these headphones for the quality. I use these with PS4 and they are equal to my wireless golds in my opinion and a lot less bulky.

title: Good
text: Pretty good for the money. However, the bass sounds like it crackles instead of the nice " thump" that I like

title: Uncomfortable
text: Good sound but got sharp metal edge near foam tip make uncomfortable first try. Return. You can run fingers feel it yourself and know what I talking about. A tiny mistake design flaw make $100 stuff come down to $1.00 haha.

title: These headphones cost HOW MUCH? (The best headphones I've had ever since)
text: I just got these for a new birthday present and oh my lord, the bass is so rich, the sound is so pure. They beat the sound quality of my $40 gaming headphones by a MILE! (my headphones are RUNMUS k8 blues that are gud) I would strongly recommend buying this pair of headphones since again, the quality is just amazing for $20 dollars, absolutely amazing. Great work over there at KLIM!! You guys are KILLIN' it!

title: Don't waste your time.
text: Didn't work out of box. One side has no sound. Volume turned up but still not very loud. But they look good.

title: Great
text: They have a nice long cord and I like the volume control

title: Short cord/ sound is very tin like/ not much base
text: I bought these because I needed a longer cord. The add said they were 62 inches long. False. They are only 51 inches long. Short 10 inches. I'm so disappointed. The sound is also very tin like. Not hearing much base. Can't use them to workout. I did not feel any background noise was cancelled.

title: Crap
text: Left side stopped working after ONE day!

title: Don’t waste your money.
text: These things are junk. Took them out of the package and the right ear did not work. If I could give them no stars I would.

title: Excellent Sound Quality
text: Excellent sound quality! The best I've ever heard for small earbuds. Seller reached out to see if I was satisfied with the purchase! Try these. You won't be sorry you did!

title: Great Headphones!
text: They fit well, sound excellent & I really like that the ear inserts are made out of memory foam... My gf won't wear a much more expensive pair she has, but loves these & their support crew is excellent :)

title: I'm really happy I bought these – I would buy again in a heartbeat
text:
These are nice earbuds for the money. The nose cancellation is accomplished primarily by the memory foam ear plug style buds. These fit over the regular buds -- all of which are included. I really like that, as it makes them comfortable to wear while it's blocking out the noise.

One thing about these is that the wires/plastic covering are really stiff. This means that I have a hard time keeping it from standing up and touching my face (I use them primarily sitting up in bed, as I read and listen to music). If I was upright, maybe working or walking/jogging, it wouldn't be a problem I suspect.

I did contact the company about buying replacement memory foam buds, as my experience with actual foamy ear plugs is that they get dirty and don't form to fit your ears as well. They responded immediately that they do have them, and asked me which size I needed, and which color I wanted. AWESOME! However, I've been using these for a couple of months now, and they aren't dirt

title: Love them
text: My daughter love them these are for school Computer class love the case too

title: Great headphones - so far
text: So far so good.  A great value

title: My 3rd pair
text: Got one for my husband and recently a pair for myself.  My daughter got them for Xmas. She can't keep any earbuds alive for more than a month and these lasted 3 months.

title: Not recommended
text: I've used these for about a month and there's already problems.  There is an audible low humming noise.  I don't appreciate the extra acoustic bass that these earbuds have, I prefer just normal earbuds that don't have an extended chamber that makes sound seem like is it traveling some distance in space, like a hollowed out cavern.  I've connected these earbuds to my phone and have accidentally dropped my phone a couple of times.  These earbuds are sensitive that being dropped causes their sound quality to deteriorate and also the green connector is not bent from originally being straight.  It took some time for me to reach this conclusion but normal earbuds perhaps suit me best, not some earbuds that have some sort of special engineering that doesn't improve sound quality at all.

title: A good deal
text: Sound quality is good, and they stay put when I’m running 👌

title: Would Buy Again
text: Very good quality for price.. would buy again..

title: Soooo CHEAP Looking and very uncomfortable
text: I really hate these earbuds. Im so surprised. Normally good reviews on Amazon land me a great purchase but not this time. They are extremely cheap looking and very uncomfortable hurts my ears. SIGH

title: Keep falling out of my ears
text: I wouldn't be able to tell you about the sound quality because these ear buds are so ergonomically incorrect I can't even keep them in my ears. Just flushed $20 down the toilet.

title: A lot of product for the money
text: Good product. Few companies push out earbuds with memory foam under $20 the unfortunate thing is that they seem to have put too much money into including buds for every type of ear. Theres like 6 different sizes and types in here. I wish they spent more on the quality of the cable because it seems flimsy and the plastic cheap. The speakers themself are pretty good.

title: Nice experience
text:
When I had a problem with my headset, They were all pleasant and happy to help.
Replaced them for me and I received them quickly.

title: they do not stay in place, maybe too small
text: they are confortable, but too small

title: Great Earbuds
text:
For plug-in earbuds, these can't be beat. Great fit in the ears, snug, but not uncomfortable. Excellent sound quality and noise reduction. I really like the wired cabling as it feels quite sturdy when compared to other plastic/rubber coated cords.
I think they are well worth the money!

title: Great sound at a great price.
text: Great ear buds, plus fun email from company. Wife love's them.

title: Highly recommend
text: The sound quality is great. This company did not leave a stone unturned. It has a clip for the cord, a few different foam choices in a circulated circular enclosed case and that is enclosed in a case. If you need it then it is in the packaging.

title: Works well for the limited use it was purchased for
text: Used for watching Netflix or TV shows on laptop. So works well for this purpose .

title: they work ok
text: Sound quality is ok but I've had a lot better sound quality out of several other earbuds in the same price range.

title: Great sound; ear pillows are not robust
text: I like everything about these buds except for the softness of the earpads.  They feel great, but are not sturdy enough to hold onto the base.  They kept falling off, sometimes in my ear.  I switched the pads out for some old rubber ones and problem solved.  I particularly like the "real" inline volume control.

title: Keep falling out
text: I could not keep them on in my ears.

title: Good sound and size
text: Good selection of ear plugs for different ear sizes. Good sound but not noise canceling. Good value.

title: Good quality
text: For the price, they are quite good.  Great mic, sound is fine for not over the ear style. Material doesn’t feel cheap like others with similar price. Happy with product so far .
